descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: Average dimension of crystalline grains in material
descriptors.rationale: Fundamental microstructure parameter affecting mechanical properties

representation.notes: Direct physical measurement, typically log-normal distributed

quality.loss_reason: Single statistic loses full size distribution
quality.notes: Mean/median collapses multimodal or heterogeneous distributions

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: Angular deviation between adjacent grain crystal orientations
descriptors.rationale: Controls grain boundary energy and material behavior

representation.notes: Mean, variance, skewness or binned distribution

quality.loss_reason: Moments or bins discard spatial correlation information
quality.notes: Statistical summary loses fine structure and correlations

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: Degree of preferred crystallographic orientation in polycrystal
descriptors.rationale: Quantifies anisotropy in mechanical and physical properties

representation.notes: ODF expanded in generalized spherical harmonics

quality.loss_reason: Finite truncation of infinite basis expansion
quality.notes: Error decreases with more coefficients; controllable accuracy
